assertions.title: Staggered card animation on list pages

steps.expected: Stagger animation configured on list pages
steps.observed: Found staggerChildren in ProductGrid.tsx (50ms), football/page.tsx (50ms), basketball/page.tsx (50ms), concert/page.tsx (50ms), my/page.tsx (30ms)

steps.expected: Product cards visible with staggered entrance
steps.observed: Product cards rendered in grid with stagger animation support (itemVariants with opacity:0→1, y:20→0)
Football match cards rendered with staggered animation
staggerChildren: 0.05 (50ms) on most pages, 0.03 (30ms) on profile - all within 30-100ms range

evidence.consoleErrors: 1 pre-existing error (Invalid or unexpected token) - not related to stagger animation
evidence.codeEvidence: staggerChildren found in 5 files: ProductGrid.tsx (0.05), football/page.tsx (0.05), basketball/page.tsx (0.05), concert/page.tsx (0.05), my/page.tsx (0.03)

steps.action: Navigate to /login, fill email and password, submit
steps.observed: Green toast at top of screen showing 'Login successful!' with check icon, auto-dismissed after ~3 seconds
Logout triggers showToast('Logged out successfully', 'info') - redirected to login page (toast auto-dismissed before screenshot due to 3s timer + redirect)
Toast.tsx: auto-dismiss 3000ms, spring animation (y:-100→0 enter, opacity:0 exit), supports success/error/info types
ToastProvider mounted in LayoutWrapper.tsx wrapping app tree

evidence.codeEvidence: Toast.tsx: 3000ms auto-dismiss, motion spring animation (damping:20, stiffness:300), success/error/info types with icons

assertions.title: Visible press/active states on interactive elements

steps.action: Grep for active: and whileTap in app/ and components/
steps.expected: Many matches showing custom press states
steps.observed: 18 matches found across both directories
ProductCard.tsx: active:scale-[0.98]
MatchCard.tsx: active:scale-[0.98], BasketballCard.tsx: active:scale-[0.98], ConcertCard.tsx: active:scale-[0.98]
BottomTabNavigation.tsx: active:scale-95
Button.tsx: whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}, FloatingCustomerService.tsx: whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }}
login/page.tsx: active:scale-95, register/page.tsx: active:scale-[0.98]
Annotated screenshot shows all interactive elements with proper styling

evidence.codeEvidence: 18 instances of active:/whileTap across: ProductCard, MatchCard, BasketballCard, ConcertCard, Button, FloatingCS, BottomTabNavigation, BannerCarousel, login/page, register/page, my/page

steps.action: Measure tab bar items via JS getBoundingClientRect
steps.observed: Tab items: 75x64px each (all >= 44px)
CS button: 56x56px (>= 44px)
Previous/Next banner buttons: 44x44px each (exactly meets minimum)

steps.action: Grep for min-h-[44px] and min-w-[44px] classes
steps.observed: Found in: BottomTabNavigation.tsx (44px), FloatingCustomerService.tsx (48px), BannerCarousel.tsx (44px), login/page.tsx (44px), register/page.tsx (44px)
Product cards are full-width card elements well exceeding 44px in both dimensions

evidence.codeEvidence: Explicit min-h-[44px]/min-w-[44px] on tabs (44px), CS button (48px), banner buttons (44px), icon buttons (44px). Measured dimensions: tabs 75x64, CS 56x56, banners 44x44

steps.action: Navigate to goods page, search for 'xyznonexistent12345'
steps.observed: Package/box icon displayed with 'No products found' heading and 'Try a different search term' subtext

steps.action: Navigate to football page, search for 'xyznonexistent99999'
steps.observed: Trophy icon displayed with 'No matches found' heading and 'Try a different search term' subtext

steps.action: Verify not blank or raw 'No data'
steps.observed: Both pages show contextual icon + heading + helpful subtext, not blank space or raw text

evidence.network: Search API returned empty results successfully

steps.action: Navigate to goods page, locate floating CS button
steps.expected: Floating button visible in bottom-right area
steps.observed: Blue circular button with MessageCircle icon visible at bottom-right (fixed position, bottom:96px, right:16px)
box-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.16) 0px 8px 32px 0px (shadow-elevated class)
56x56px actual size, min-h-[48px] min-w-[48px] in CSS class
whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} for press feedback, hover:bg-primary-600 for hover state, transition-colors for smooth transitions
Has elevated shadow, primary-500 gradient-like color, MessageCircle icon from lucide-react, border-radius 9999px

evidence.codeEvidence: FloatingCustomerService.tsx: motion/react m.button, whileTap scale:0.9, shadow-elevated, min-h-[48px] min-w-[48px], bg-primary-500, hover:bg-primary-600, rounded-full, MessageCircle icon

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. VAL-UX-006 (stagger animation 30-50ms across 5 list pages), VAL-UX-007 (toast system with 3s auto-dismiss, spring animations, login/logout toasts confirmed), VAL-UX-008 (18 active:/whileTap instances across all interactive elements), VAL-UX-009 (all touch targets >= 44px confirmed via JS measurement and CSS class audit), VAL-UX-010 (friendly empty states with icons and descriptive text on goods and football pages), VAL-ADD-003 (polished floating CS button: 56x56px, elevated shadow, whileTap feedback, MessageCircle icon).
